title: RESTful Todo API
description: Create a simple RESTful API for managing tasks. Include basic CRUD endpoints, proper HTTP status codes, and store the data in memory or a simple SQLite database.

title: Authentication Service
description: Build an authentication service that supports user registration, login, and JWT-based token issuance. Password should be hashed securely before storing in a database.

title: Background Job Processing
description: Implement a system that queues heavy background jobs (like sending emails or processing images) using Redis and a message broker like RabbitMQ or BullMQ.
